subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath believed and been guided, that the Call of his Lord may draw him unto the Most Exalted Station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی آمن و هدی لیجذبه ندآء ربه الی المقام الاقصی الذی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
